title: The Strong Adventurer
description: A player claimed mixing ingredients 1 and 2 gives R+, and the actual result was a total match. What is the actual mixing result?

hints.text: What does a strong adventurer require to accept a potion?
Strong = exact match required (colour AND sign). Success means the actual result matched exactly.
Claimed R+ + strong tier + success → actual result must be exactly R+.
